=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:24-5:41) TS377022: The 'catch' callback in Effect.tryPromise returns global 'Error', which loses type safety as untagged errors merge together. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property. effect(globalErrorInEffectCatch)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for entire file"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for this line" ===
skipped by default
